/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,libfusion_engine_client.so.1 -o libfusion_engine_client.so.1.22.0 CMakeFiles/fusion_engine_client.dir/src/point_one/fusion_engine/common/logging.cc.o CMakeFiles/fusion_engine_client.dir/src/point_one/fusion_engine/messages/crc.cc.o CMakeFiles/fusion_engine_client.dir/src/point_one/fusion_engine/messages/data_version.cc.o CMakeFiles/fusion_engine_client.dir/src/point_one/fusion_engine/parsers/fusion_engine_framer.cc.o CMakeFiles/fusion_engine_client.dir/src/point_one/rtcm/rtcm_framer.cc.o
